extraction.one_line_summary: VIVIANI Elia won sprint stage after Quick-Step controlled wet finale, taking intermediate sprint points earlier to pad Ciclamino lead.
tactical_patterns: Quick-Step allowed breakaway quartet to settle after Jennis-Paulis mountain points dispute, calculating GC gap neutralized stage threat.
Viviani contested intermediate sprint points despite breakaway presence, revealing Quick-Step prioritizing points jersey margin over energy conservation.
Rain arrival with 11km triggered early positioning scramble, catching Bennett isolated without lead-out train while Viviani retained Sabatini.
Van Poppel launched premature sprint on right forcing Bennett wide left while Viviani held centerline with superior positioning through final turn.

rider_signals.VIVIANI Elia: positive: Contested intermediate sprint points despite already leading classification, showing hunger to mathematically seal Ciclamino before final stages.
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: negative: Isolated without teammates in crucial wet finale positioning battle, boxed to tenth wheel while rival had double lead-out protection.
rider_signals.SABATINI Fabio: positive: Delivered Viviani perfectly positioned through wet final turn while rival lead-out trains disintegrated in rain chaos.
rider_signals.VAN POPPEL Danny: neutral: Premature launch from right side created positioning chaos but lacked acceleration to capitalize on early jump.
